name: 离散制造基础包
description: 离散制造基础包 ：覆盖 CNC 加工中心、装配工位、AGV 牵引车、工装台、测试台、物料车和码垛工作站等典型离散制造设备。

notes: Keep machining and robot handling in adjacent bays so robot loading can serve CNC equipment.
Place assembly and conveyor downstream of machining.
Place inspection before packaging and dispatch.
Use AGV and pipe corridor as logistics and utility spines along the workshop side.

aliases: 生成一个离散制造车间

stations.label: Storage rack
stations.equipmentHint: discrete_manufacturing.storage_rack tall warehouse storage rack with uprights, shelves, pallet loads, and aisle marker

stations.label: Pallet kitting table
stations.equipmentHint: discrete_manufacturing.pallet_table low kitting pallet table with pallet top, support legs, and material bins

stations.label: Chip conveyor
stations.equipmentHint: discrete_manufacturing.chip_conveyor small inclined chip conveyor with trough frame, belt, discharge chute, and drive motor
